steps.t: The banners of Angmar can be found in Bail Dílas, west of Gath Forthnír. Húriel asked you to enter Bail Dílas and remove the banners of Angmar, replac…
Húriel is at Gath Forthnír, east of Bail Dílas. You have replaced all of Angmar's banners at Bail Dílas and should now return with them to Húriel.
